page.text:
Interviewer – What does this framework include?
Captain James – For ships, the framework includes requirements for:
• Ship security plans.
• Ship security officers
• Company security officers
• Certain onboard equipment
Interviewer – What about port security?
Captain James – For port facilities, the requirements include:
• Port facility security plans
• Port facility security officers
• Certain security equipment
In addition, the requirements for ships and for port facilities include:
• Monitoring and controlling access
• Monitoring the activities of people and cargo
• Ensuring security communications are readily available
Interviewer – Thank you for your time Captain James, I feel I know much more about the ISPS Code now.
